scripts.build:discovery: npm --prefix packages/site-content-pack run discovery && node scripts/sync_site_discovery.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:site-content && npm run build:discovery && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test: npm --prefix packages/site-content-pack run test && npm run build && tsx tests/site-render-smoke.tsx && tsx tests/site-discovery-smoke.mjs
